parts.text: Run your scheduled status check-in now. Keep it concise, supportive, and actionable. Do not execute external actions.

Assalamu Alaikum! 🕌

Your daily status check-in for Monday, March 23, 2026:

**Prayer Status:**
- Next prayer: Maghrib in ~1 hour 49 minutes (19:49 local time)
- Weekly on-time: 20% (7/35), but no late or missed prayers - that's positive! 🤲

**Spiritual Progress:**
- Quran reading: 27 pages this week - great consistency! 📖
- Tahajjud: 3/4 nights - wonderful dedication! ✨
- Adhkar: 0/1 - opportunity to add morning/evening remembrances

**Actionable Suggestions:**
- Prepare for Maghrib prayer soon
- Consider setting a daily reminder for morning/evening adhkar
- Keep up the Quran reading - you're making good progress!

Remember, small consistent steps lead to beautiful habits. May Allah accept your efforts and grant you strength in your worship. 🌙
